sentences.arabic: حِينَ نَخْرُجُ إِلَى الطَّبِيعَةِ نَشْعُرُ بِالرَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada izlazimo u prirodu osjećamo se odmoreno.
sentences.translationEn: When we go out into nature we feel rested.

sentences.arabic: مَشَى طَارِقٌ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ الْهَوَاءَ النَّظِيفَ.
sentences.translation: Tariq je šetao u parku i udisao čist zrak.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq walked in the park and breathed in the clean air.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ تَعَبُهُ وَشَعَرَ بِهُدُوءٍ فِي نَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Umor je otišao i osjetio je mir u sebi.
sentences.translationEn: His tiredness went away and he felt calm inside.

sentences.translation: Priroda liječi um i obnavlja energiju.
sentences.translationEn: Nature heals the mind and renews energy.
